title: The Strange Case of the Lost Treasure of the Flor de la Mar

scenes.text: An enormous treasure ship sank, taking riches to the depths.
The Flor de la Mar sank near the Malay Peninsula in 1511.
Carrying one of the largest treasures ever, the ship went down during a storm.
To this day, the treasure has never been recovered despite many search attempts.
scenes.label: UNSOLVED TREASURE

scenes.text: Follow for a new cold case every day.

description: 📍 Malay Peninsula, Malaysia - 1511. The Flor de la Mar sank with an immense treasure on board, leaving its riches hidden beneath the waves for centuries. Follow for daily cold cases!
